title: clitoria flexuosa var. flexuosa
intro: Clitoria flexuosa var. flexuosa, also known as the climbing butterfly pea or delicate butterfly pea, is a perennial vine plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Clitoria flexuosa var. flexuosa include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
